title: U.S. Hunts for Militants as the Nigerian Military Is Accused of Inaction
author: Saikou Jammeh, Ruth Maclean, Dickson Adama and Ismail Auwal
fullText: The country has one of the most feared armed forces in Africa, yet within its own borders, it has repeatedly failed to stop abductions and attacks.
summary: The country has one of the most feared armed forces in Africa, yet within its own borders, it has repeatedly failed to stop abductions and attacks.
